---
title: "contact me"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-md-5 .g-col-12}

I'm usually very good at responding to emails (except when I'm not, and then I feel extremely bad). If you contact me, though, I promise I will get back to you at some point.

**Email:** vladimir dot chituc at yale dot edu

**Address:**\
100 College Street\
New Haven, CT 06510

:::

::: {.g-col-md-7 .g-col-12}

<form class="contact-form" action="https://formspree.io/f/PLACEHOLDER" method="POST">

<div class="grid">
<div class="g-col-6">
<label for="first-name">First Name <span style="color: #999;">(required)</span></label>
<input type="text" name="first-name" id="first-name" required>
</div>
<div class="g-col-6">
<label for="last-name">Last Name <span style="color: #999;">(required)</span></label>
<input type="text" name="last-name" id="last-name" required>
</div>
</div>

<label for="email">Email Address <span style="color: #999;">(required)</span></label>
<input type="email" name="email" id="email" required>

<label for="subject">Subject <span style="color: #999;">(required)</span></label>
<input type="text" name="subject" id="subject" required>

<label for="message">Message <span style="color: #999;">(required)</span></label>
<textarea name="message" id="message" required></textarea>

<button type="submit">SUBMIT</button>

</form>

:::

:::
